Tests WebMCP invokeTool command.
Enabling WebMCP Domain
\n--- Invoking test_tool ---
invokeTool response: {
    invocationId : <string 0>
}
toolResponded invocationId matches
toolResponded event: {
    invocationId : <string 0>
    output : hello world
    status : Completed
}
\n--- Invoking with invalid tool name ---
Tool not found
\n--- Invoking with invalid frameId ---
No frame for given id found
\n--- Invoking failing_tool (should fail execution) ---
invokeTool response: {
    invocationId : <string 1>
}
toolResponded invocationId matches
toolResponded event for failing tool: {
    errorText :
    exception : {
        className : Error
        description : Error: This tool always fails     at fail (<anonymous>:12:19)
        objectId : <string 2>
        subtype : error
        type : object
    }
    invocationId : <string 1>
    status : Error
}
